name: clawlike-code
description: Persistent memory for Claude Code. Injects a contract-aware memory tree on every SessionStart, transcribes sessions, and runs a Haiku safety-net classifier that proposes memory edits when the agent forgets to write something. Inspired by openclaw and CoALA.

CLAWLIKE_MODEL.description: Model used by the safety-net classifier and session summariser. Default: claude-haiku-4-5-20251001.

CLAWLIKE_COOLDOWN_SECS.description: Minimum seconds between safety-net classifier runs per user. Default: 10.

CLAWLIKE_MAX_TURNS.description: How many recent turns the classifier reads from the transcript fork. Default: 12.

CLAWLIKE_MAX_TOKENS.description: Soft cap on the SessionStart memory envelope size, in tokens (chars/3.5 approximation). When exceeded, the largest file bodies are programmatically truncated in place with a notice pointing to the source file. contract: frontmatter is preserved. Default: 30000.
